title: cyphomandra pendula
intro: Cyphomandra pendula, also known as the tree tomato or tamarillo, is a species of flowering plant in the nightshade family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. The health benefits of Cyphomandra pendula include its potential to help lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions.
